summary: The implementation successfully addresses all requirements. The ActivityTimeline component now displays a structured layout with sub-header, date/timestamp, horizontally arranged action and outcome pills, and comment text. The backend Comment type has been updated to include action and outcome fields, with proper migration support. The ActivitySection component was also updated to capture and submit action and outcome data.

hallucinated_features.description: ActivitySection component was modified to include action and outcome input fields and submission logic
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states in non-goals: 'Changing the comment submission functionality in ActivitySection'. However, the diff shows ActivitySection was modified to add Action and Outcome input fields, validation logic, and updated submission to include these fields.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module added to handle data structure changes for existing comments
hallucinated_features.reason: Migration logic was not requested in any requirement. While it is a reasonable engineering practice for data structure changes, it was not specified in the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Author display logic with 'You' vs 'User' differentiation in ActivityTimeline
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirements specify displaying comment data but do not mention special author display logic or differentiating between current user and others.

hallucinated_features.description: Scrollable timeline with max-height constraint and smooth-scroll styling
hallucinated_features.reason: While displaying the timeline was required, specific scrolling behavior and height constraints were not mentioned in the requirements.
